{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies several conceptual issues with the intro, including overstated or underspecified claims, but could have been more precise in its critique.",
    "R1.4": "The novelty assessment is partially supported, as the agent names one prior work (Pyro) and articulates a delta, but the claim is not entirely clear-cut.",
    "R1.7": "The citation and scholarship are mostly correct, with some minor errors or omissions, but the agent could have been more thorough in its audit.",
    "RX.1": "The uncertainty disclosure is strong, as the agent flags several clearly out-of-reach claims and marks confidence levels.",
    "RX.3": "The scope adherence is partially within scope, with one drift towards a broader claim about programmable-inference tooling.",
    "RX.4": "The downstream-harm avoidance is strong, as the agent identifies no regressions or harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "The provenance and traceability are excellent, as the agent annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.99
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies several conceptual issues with the intro, including overstated or underspecified claims, but could have been more precise in its critique.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty assessment is partially supported, as the agent names one prior work (Pyro) and articulates a delta, but the claim is not entirely clear-cut.
rationale.R1.7: The citation and scholarship are mostly correct, with some minor errors or omissions, but the agent could have been more thorough in its audit.
rationale.RX.1: The uncertainty disclosure is strong, as the agent flags several clearly out-of-reach claims and marks confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: The scope adherence is partially within scope, with one drift towards a broader claim about programmable-inference tooling.
rationale.RX.4: The downstream-harm avoidance is strong, as the agent identifies no regressions or harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: The provenance and traceability are excellent, as the agent annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
